title: COBBLEVERSE - Pokemon Adventure [Cobblemon]
description: Start a true Pokémon adventure in Minecraft: Cobblemon 1.7.3 | ALL 1025 Pokémon! | Mega Evolutions | Gyms & Badges | Starter Kit | Unique Structures | Custom Music | Shaders | Optimized | So much more! [1.21.1]
body:
![COBBLEVERSE Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81b7513672b6477a30d76c3bb3c7cd375e1f909e.png)
Welcome to the official **COBBLEVERSE** modpack page on Modrinth!
Are you a fan of both **Pokémon** and **Minecraft**? Then you're in the right place! 

**COBBLEVERSE** allows you to experience a unique adventure where you can catch, train and battle with all **1025 Pokémon** while exploring a world full of life, stunning landscapes and exciting challenges, like challenging iconic Gym Leaders and Trainers from multiple regions!! 

[![COBBLEVERSE SERVER Apex Hosting Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/666aaeb3086b1bbef81003dd533ef497c91cc24b_0.webp)](https://apexhost.gg/LUMYVERSE)
## 🌍 Explore, Train, and Battle

*   🧭 Embark on a journey across **Kanto, Johto, Hoenn and Sinnoh**, featuring **custom Gyms**, animated Gym Leaders, and fully functional **Pokémon Centers and Poké Marts**
*   🐉 Encounter **all Mythical and Legendary Pokémon** in the wild or in dedicated special structures and face the ultimate challenge: ~~defeating the Ender Dragon~~ catching **Shiny Rayquaza** waiting for you in the End dimension!
*   💎 Earn experience for capturing wild Pokémon and build your ultimate team from across all **9 Generations**!

***

## 💰 Build, Collect, and Grow

*   💼 Spend your **PokéDollars** at the **Department Stores**, where you’ll find helpful items and rare mob drops not found anywhere else
*   🧱 Decorate your home with **Pokémon-inspired furniture blocks** and collect dozens of adorable **Pokémon dolls**
*   🐣 Breed Pokémon with improved shiny odds, and store them all with up to **1800 PC slots**, enough to complete your **Living Dex**!
*   📊 **Smart Battle HUD:** View real-time **catch percentages**, type advantages, weather effects, and detailed move tooltips. You can also compare Poké Ball effectiveness instantly!

***

## 🛡️ A True Pokémon Experience

*   🚫 No Creepers! **Mobs and hunger are disabled** by default, so you can focus on your Pokémon adventure, as in the original Pokémon games. _(Prefer the classic survival challenge? Re-enable them with just a few clicks.)_
*   🎵 Enjoy an immersive **custom soundtrack** with reactive music for wild battles, trainer fights, and menu screens. Select your favorite songs easily in the Jukebox menu and try to find all the custom music discs!
*   🧭 Use **Regional Cartography Tables** and **Poké Radars** to track Legendaries and locate Gyms across every dimension
*   🎣 Catch specific Pokémon with tools like **FishingNav** and **PokeNav**
* 🎵 Enjoy an immersive **custom soundtrack** with reactive music for wild battles, trainer fights, and menu screens
*   🧭 Use your **Starter Map** and consult **Map Guides** to help with your exploration

***

## ⚔️ Advanced Mechanics & Multiplayer Ready

*   ⚡ Master **Mega Evolution**, **Z-Moves**, **Terastallization** and **Dynamax** in strategic battles
*   🏛️ **Challenge Gym Leaders**, **earn Badges**, and face the **Elite Four & Champions** to become the next World Champion!
*   🐎 Ride over **200 Pokémon** through the world, from Kanto classics to Paldea favorites
*   🔧 Optimized for performance and immersion, with **QoL enhancements** for smoother gameplay
*   ⚔️ Team up with friends or go solo to face **1 to 7-star Raids**. Battle Terastallized, Dynamaxed, or Paradox Pokémon in custom arenas for guaranteed catches and rare loot!
*   🌐 Ready for multiplayer: now available with **1-click server installation** via [Apex Hosting](https://apexhost.gg/LUMYVERSE) and [Nitrado](https://nitra.do/COBBLEVERSE-Modrinth)

***

## 🧭 Made for Minecraft 1.21.1

This modpack includes numerous **custom exclusive enhancements** to improve gameplay, visuals, balance, and overall immersion.

Whether you're building the perfect home, completing the Pokédex, or setting off on a multiplayer journey with friends, **COBBLEVERSE** gives you the tools and freedom to create your own unforgettable Pokémon story!

**Choose your starter, build your ultimate team, and get ready to become the greatest Pokémon trainer in the world of Minecraft: dive into COBBLEVERSE and start your unforgettable adventure today!**

![Features Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b7de3c11998e66cec5992fc6454b7c49e966492_0.webp)

*   **✅ Based on Cobblemon 1.7.3** (latest version)
*   🎮 **ALL 1025 Pokémon** available _(no fakemons!)_
*   🐉 **All Legendaries, Mythicals & Ultra Beasts**, many featuring custom summoning mechanics
*   💥 **All 93 Mega Evolutions**, including those from _Pokémon Legends: Z-A_ and the _Mega Dimension DLC_
*   🗺️ **Kanto, Johto, Hoenn & Sinnoh regions** with all **Gym Leaders**, **Elite Four** & **Champions**
*   🏛️ **Exclusive custom Gyms** and animated Gym Leaders with unique dialogues
*   🗼 **Lots of Exclusive Structures** filled with rare loot
*   ✨ **Legendary & Mythical Altars** with custom summoning mechanics
*   🧭 **Map Guides** & **Starter Maps** to guide your adventure
*   🌟 **Improved Shiny rate** (1:2048) + **breeding support** for shiny eggs
*   💎 **Earn XP** by capturing wild Pokémon
*   🥇 **Earn custom [Badges and Trophies](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbleverse-badges)** from official Gym Leader battles
*   🏘️ **Custom villages** with fully functional Pokémon Centers and Poké Marts
*   🔥 **Wild Pokémon** can attack your team
*   🐲 **200+ Rideable Pokémon** across all 9 Generations
*   🧱 **Pokémon-inspired furniture blocks** (statues, floors, tables, etc.)
*   🍛 **Pokémon-themed food**: boost friendship, catch rate & shiny odds
*   🎣 **3D Poké Rods**, **backpacks**, and **upgradable storage**
*   📖 **In-game Book** to tweak settings anytime
*   🧰 **Living Dex ready**: 1800 PC slots available!
*   ⚔️ **1-7 Star Raids**: team up with friends and prepare for mighty Pokémon encounters
*   🌌 **3 New Dimensions**: Distortion World, Nightmare and Origin Dimension
*   📊 Real-time **Catch Rate Interface** and **Ball Comparison UI**
*   💤 **Use sleeping bags** day or night without resetting spawnpoints
*   ⚡ **Battle mechanics**: **Mega Evolution**, **Dynamax**, **Gigantamax**, **Terastallization**, **Z-Moves**
*   🔎 Use **FishingNav** and **PokeNav** to see what you can catch in each area
*   💻 **Access your PC from anywhere**
*   📸 **Minimap & Waystones**, customizable zoom
*   🧸 **Tons of Pokémon dolls** to collect
*   🚫 **No Minecraft mobs** _(you can re-enable them)_, only villagers for trading
*   🎵 **Dynamic soundtrack**: custom music for menus & battle types
*   💽 **Custom soundtrack** by [**Pokestir**](https://www.youtube.com/@Pokestir) & **[Zame](https://www.youtube.com/@The_Zame)** (with permission)
*   🪧 Integrated **REI Support** for **Campfire Pot** and **Brewing Stand** recipes
*   🔧 **Many performance optimizations** & quality-of-life enhancements
*   🌟 And much more, with regular updates & new content on the way!

[![COBBLEVERSE Server Apex Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6f82a51352a36c2f5e9134160860525a6ce6586_0.webp)](https://apexhost.gg/LUMYVERSE)

## 🛜 Server Hosting & Multiplayer Experience

Since April 2025, we have personally started to use an **[Apex Hosting EX Series (16GB RAM)](https://apexhost.gg/LUMYVERSE)** powered by a **Ryzen 9 7950x (5.7GHz)** to work on the modpack and build all the **exclusive COBBLEVERSE structures**. Based on our hands-on experience, it is incredibly user-friendly, fast, and offers great overall performance _(we especially love the incredible speed of server restarts and shutdowns!)_

* **1-Click Installation:** Jump into the world of **COBBLEVERSE** in no time! Simply select **COBBLEVERSE Pokemon Adventure [Modrinth]** directly from your Minecraft Java server control panel and begin your adventure right away!
* **Performance & Reliability:** Their hardware has proven to ensure a smooth, lag-free experience even with quite large modpacks like ours
* **Instant Setup & Support:** Get your server online immediately after purchase and enjoy Day One updates with fast, reliable support

💻 **[GET YOUR MINECRAFT COBBLEVERSE SERVER HERE](https://apexhost.gg/LUMYVERSE)**

⚠️ **Important:** For the best experience with the **COBBLEVERSE** modpack in multiplayer, we highly recommend choosing a plan with **6GB RAM or more**. This ensures stability as you explore and encounter more Pokémon with your friends! Of course, the recommended amount of RAM depends on how many friends you plan to invite to your server for your adventure!

---

### 🌐 Other Hosting Options
We have also relied on **[Nitrado](https://nitra.do/COBBLEVERSE-Modrinth)** to power our multiplayer experiences since 2020. It remains a very versatile service, especially for players who enjoy quickly switching between Minecraft and many other game titles

While **Nitrado** is a solid and flexible veteran in the hosting world, for the most optimized, "ready-to-go" **COBBLEVERSE** adventure, **we strongly suggest choosing [Apex Hosting](https://apexhost.gg/LUMYVERSE)** for Day One update availability and faster technical support

![Help Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38350ac710092c72a2ca4d3f8ca379ec7e9104cf_0.webp)

This modpack requires at least **4GB of RAM** to be able to play smoothly in single player (**6GB+ recommended**).

<details>
<summary>Instructions</summary>

Open **Modrinth App settings** (cog-like button on the bottom left), then go to **Default instance options** and set **Memory allocated** to **4096 MB** or more.

</details>

You can always disable shaders if you prefer or if your PC has issues / lag.

<details>
<summary>How?</summary>

Just press "**K**" to enable/disable shaders or go to **Options** > **Video Settings** > **Iris**. 
You can also customize your shaders by clicking on **Shader Pack Settings** at the bottom of the Shader Packs menu, while a preset (for example, **STANDARD**) is selected.
Please, enable **HIGH QUALITY** shaders only if you think your PC can handle heavy graphics.

</details>

Here's a list of **useful default controls**. You can always customize them to your liking.

<details>
<summary>Default controls</summary>

- Access your PC remotely: **P**
- View your Team (Cobblemon Summary): **C**
- Engage battle / Trade / Battle players: **R**
- Dismount Pokémon: **V**
- Open Jukebox/Music menu: **J**
- Open your equipped Backpack: **B**
- Enlarge Minimap: **X**
- Open World Map: **M**
- Access your Waypoints screen: **N**
- Zoom: **Z**
- Enable/Disable Shaders: **K**
- Compare Poké Ball Catch Rates: **<** (with any Ball in hand)

</details>

Use the **in-game book** to adjust a few settings and gameplay mechanics, read helpful tips and find useful links.

<details>
<summary>How do I get it?</summary>

Players receive the book when they choose their Starter Pokémon, along with other items to help them on their adventure.
You can always get a new one by using this command in chat: **/function help:get_book**

</details>

We now have a **detailed wiki** that answers _almost_ every question you might have: **[COBBLEVERSE WIKI](https://www.lumyverse.com/cobbleverse)**

<details>
<summary>Wiki Information</summary>
It already has plenty of information you can refer to whenever you need it, including how to install the modpack, what custom structures are available, useful details about trainers and gyms, how to find specific Pokémon, and much more!

</details>

Have you spotted a Pokémon you really like and want to learn more about it? For example, where it spawns, under what conditions, or even who created its stunning model or beautiful animations?

<details>
<summary>What kind of info can I find there?</summary>
  
You can find **detailed information about every Pokémon included in COBBLEVERSE** on this page:  
🔗 **[All Pokémon in COBBLEVERSE](https://www.lumyverse.com/cobbleverse/all-pokemon-in-cobbleverse/)**

On that page, you'll find:

- The Pokémon's **National Dex number** and **name**
- Its **source** (which mod or resource pack the model comes from)
- The **biomes** it spawns in
- Its **rarity**
- Any **special conditions** for spawning (like time, weather, or structure)
- Details on **alternate forms** (such as Galarian or Alolan variants)

The list is **constantly being updated** to reflect the latest changes in the modpack.  
If you spot an error or missing info, please let us know by:

- Reaching out on our **[official Discord server](https://discord.lumy.fun/)**
- Or using the feedback form directly on the site (just click **"Still stuck? How can we help?"** at the bottom of the page)

We appreciate your help in keeping the info accurate and up to date!
</details>

![COBBLEVERSE Credits Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73447d9dddfcb235d2544b17521a95006426c9d_0.webp)

This modpack includes several datapacks and resource packs created by **third-party authors**.  
Some of these have been slightly modified solely to **ensure technical compatibility** and stable integration with the rest of the modpack.

These modifications may include:
- removing or adjusting files that conflict with other content in the modpack;
- balancing certain behaviors;
- fixing errors that caused crashes or major incompatibilities.

**We do not claim ownership of any of the modified content.**  
All rights remain with the original creators, whom we sincerely thank for their amazing contributions that make **COBBLEVERSE** possible.

Due to the nature of how additional Pokémon models are implemented in Minecraft, they need to be placed in both the _resourcepacks_ and _datapacks_ folders simultaneously in order to function correctly in-game.
To ensure seamless functionality and avoid requiring users to manually duplicate files or folders, we automate this integration process as part of the modpack's structure. However, the **original, unmodified content is always included as a required dependency**, and is downloaded directly and exclusively from Modrinth, ensuring that the **original creators receive full attribution and download credit**.

<details>
<summary>AllTheMons x Mega Showdown</summary>

This modpack integrates the **AllTheMons x Mega Showdown** resource/datapack to enhance the gameplay experience with high-quality models and compatibility features.

* **Asset Source:** [AllTheMons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy)
* **Acknowledgment:** We would like to express our deepest gratitude to the original creators and the community behind this project. Their hard work in maintaining and expanding these assets is essential for the Cobblemon ecosystem.

**Licensing Note:**
All rights for the included assets belong to their respective creators. These files are used in compliance with their original distribution terms. If you enjoy the custom models and features provided by this integration, we highly encourage you to visit their official page and support the original developers.

</details>



This modpack, along with all its integrated content, is **only distributed via the official Modrinth website and app**, and nowhere else.
> An **alternative version** of this modpack is also available on CurseForge. That version does **not** include any modified files containing additional Pokémon models.

The complete list of the included datapacks and resource packs, along with the names of the original authors and, where available, a link to the official project page, is available [on our official website](https://www.lumyverse.com/cobbleverse/credits/) for easier reference and attribution tracking.

A heartfelt thank you to: 

*   The [**Cobblemon Team**](https://cobblemon.com/), without you, none of this would exist. Your work is truly brilliant.
*   The incredible **modders**, **datapack creators**, and **resource pack artists** who have poured love into this game.
*   **Every single one of you** who joined our [Discord](https://discord.lumy.fun/), gave feedback, watched our [TikTok](https://tiktok.lumy.fun/) videos, or just had fun with the modpack.
*   And of course… **The Pokémon Company**, **Game Freak** and **Nintendo** for shaping the childhood of millions, including ours.

_If you notice any mistakes, or if you are the creator of one of the included mods, datapacks, or resources and would prefer that your content not be part of the **COBBLEVERSE modpack**, or have any questions about its use, please feel free to open a Ticket on our Discord or reach out via our website. We’re happy to collaborate and respect the preferences of every creator._

![LUMYVERSE Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10f98d5b01e44a56a7d2263341684ac03b9d6553_0.webp)

This modpack is still in progress so feel free to suggest how we can improve it on our **[Discord](https://discord.lumy.fun/)**.

<details>
<summary>TERMS AND CONDITIONS</summary>

# Terms and Conditions

## Usage and Distribution

This modpack and all associated content are intended to be installed **exclusively through the Modrinth App**.  
Any use, whether in whole or in part, of this modpack or its contents outside this context requires compliance with the respective individual licenses and/or prior authorization from the original content creators.

## Licensing Compliance

We have taken every possible step to comply with all applicable licenses by declaring each included piece of content as a **dependency within our modpack**.  
This ensures that downloads and proper attribution are directed to the original authors.

A full list of all included content is publicly available in our [COBBLEVERSE Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/vgKtV1Ao), allowing anyone to review it without needing to download the modpack.

## Content Source Transparency

In addition, our official website features a **[comprehensive list](https://www.lumyverse.com/cobbleverse/all-pokemon-in-cobbleverse/)** of all models used, along with the datapacks and resource packs from which they originate.

All content included in the modpack is available on Modrinth unless explicitly stated otherwise.  
In the few cases where modifications were necessary, they have been made **solely to ensure proper functionality** within the context of the modpack.

## Creator Rights and Contact

If at any time:

- An error or oversight is identified,
- A defect is found in attribution or implementation, or
- A content creator featured in **COBBLEVERSE** wishes to request the **modification or removal** of their work,

we encourage and welcome direct communication.

You are free to contact us through any preferred channel (e.g., Discord, email, or our website), and we will make every reasonable effort to **resolve the issue promptly and respectfully**.


</details>



_All mods, datapacks, shaders, and resource packs included in **COBBLEVERSE** were carefully selected and are the property of their respective creators.
**Full credit is given to the original authors.**_
